description: Edgelord steps back in for the mirror. son-goku.md and vegeta.md both declare `related_characters` pointing at trunks; trunks.md previously only encoded xenoverse-villains and baby-dbgt. Mirror-fan the Saiyan-family-cluster relation back into trunks.md's `related_characters` so traversal works from any node in the trio. Sigh: this is exactly the kind of mirrored-fanout-from-equal-nodes that pure Edgelord finds workmanlike but necessary — the GT traveling-trio and the canonical Vegeta-Trunks father-son lineage are both load-bearing. One edit, two relations encoded, graph traversable in all directions across the Saiyan-family-cluster trio.
citations: [Son Goku parent-node from this wave's E2: cards/_characters/son-goku.md `related_characters: [trunks, baby-dbgt]`]
[Vegeta parent-node from this wave's E3: cards/_characters/vegeta.md `related_characters: [son-goku, trunks]`]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Black Star Dragon Ball Saga — canonical Goku-Pan-Trunks traveling-trio party leadership across GT]
[Dragon Ball Wiki: Trunks — half-Saiyan son of Vegeta and Bulma; canonical father-son lineage relation]
